raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta nahze Naëmans ar fa-
weem Sirgeem/ un ar faweem
Ratteem/ un stahweja preeſch
Elisus Namna Durwin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Elisus fuhtija weenn
Wehſneſi pee to/ un likke faz-
zibt: Eij/ un masgajees feptix-
reifi eekſch Jardana/ tad buhs
tawa Meeta atkaſ weffela/ un
tu tapſt fchkihſts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Naëmans apſkai-
tahs/ un gahje nohſt / un fazzt-
ia: Raugi/ es Dohmajju pee fe-
vis/ wiꞥſch teefeham nahks pee
man ahra/ un stahwehs / un pee-
auks ta KUNGASaſwa Deewa
Wahrdu / un wiꞥſch ar fawu
Rohku pahr to Weetn brauzihs/
an to Spittalibu atzems.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi Amana un War-
wara tahs Uppes ne Dainaskus
rr labbakis/ ne ka Israëta Uh-
dens/ neggt es tur warretohs
nasgatees/ ka es fchkihſts tapru ?
n wiꞥſch greesehs atpakat / un
togahje ar Duſmahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad peegahje winna Kal-
pt/ un runnaja ar to / un fazzi-
a: Mans Tehws / buhtu tas
Braweets weenu leetu Leetu us
ew runnajs/ neggi bij tew to
arriht ? zik wairak / ka wiꞥſch
is tew fazzijs: Masgajees/ tad
apſi tu tchkihſts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nokahpe wiꞥſch/ un
masgajahs Jardana feptixreifi/
ehz ta Deewa Wihra Wahrdn/
ad tappe wiꞥſa Meefa atkaſ tik
veffela/ ka weena jouna Puſcha
Neeta/ un wiꞥſch kya fchkihſts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gabje wiꞥſch atkat
pee ta Deewa Wihra ar wiﬀeem
faweem Karra-Wthreim/ un
nahze/ un stahweja preeſch to/
un fazzijs: Raugi/ un finnu es/
ka zitta Deewa newaid eekſch
wiﬀas Bafanles/ ka ween Isra-
etza Starpa. Un un zeimn /
lubdsains / weenn Swehtibu no
tawa Kalpa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas fazzijs: Tik tee-
schain ka tas KUNGAS dshwo/
preeſch ka es stahwu/ es to ne
nemſchu. Un wiꞥſch lubdse wiꞥſ-
nu ilgt/ ka wiꞥſch to nemtu/ bet
tas leedfahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzijs Naëmans:
Ja ne/ tad bohd jelle tawan Kal-
pam Waltu tik dauds Semines
dabbuht / zik diwt Sirg-Ehseif
nest warr? jo taws Kalps ne nef-
fibs wairs fwescheim Deeween
Dedsamo-Uppurus/ nedz zittus
Uppurus/ ka ween tam KUN-
GAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schinni Leeta laid tas
KUNGAS tawam Kalpam pee-
dohd/ kad mans Kungs Rimmo-
na Namma es tur peelubgdams/
un wiꞥſch us manut Rohku at-
speediſees/un es Rimmona Nam-
na paklannifschohs / tad lai tas
KUNGAS tawam Kalpamr scho
Leetn peedohd/ kad es ta paklan-
nijohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzijs us to z
Eij ar Meeru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nn wiꞥſch notakah-
du Semnes Birſunu bij no-
gahjis/ tad dohmaja Geasus/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
